seoTitle: Kotupna vs Koyuga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kotupna and Koyuga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kotupna and Koyuga.
heading: Kotupna vs Koyuga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kotupna, Victoria and Koyuga, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kotupna has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Koyuga (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kotupna or Koyuga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kotupna has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Koyuga scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kotupna scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Koyuga scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kotupna or Koyuga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kotupna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
